ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the TV show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show (e.g., drama, comedy) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the TV show was released */,
  "imdb_url" TEXT /* IMDB URL of the TV show */,
  "encoded_title" TEXT /* Encoded title of the TV show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Average runtime of the show in minutes */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the show's creator */,
  "network" TEXT /* Broadcasting network or streaming platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., Running, Ended, On Hold) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the show's poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the show's trailer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the show's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show the episode belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "airdate" TEXT /* Airdate of the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes for the episode */,
  "episode_desc" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "episode_url" TEXT /* URL of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the episode's director */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the episode's writer */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the episode has been viewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the episode's data */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the episode is featured (for special promotions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_genres_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Episode, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_awards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_likes_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode in the watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date and time the episode was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
